---
title: "aim1_riskburden"
format: html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

# Load packages and data
```{r setting}
library(broom)
library(car)
library(patchwork)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_CLEANED_PATH$filtered, 
                                "PREVENTAD_biomarkers_filtered.rds"))
diagnosis <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_diagnosis.rds"))

predictors_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_predictors.rds"))
```

# Get last measured biomarkers
```{r biomarkers}
ptau217_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  filter(!is.na(ptau217)) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, Date_taken, age, ptau217) %>%
  slice_tail() 

other_biomarkers_last <- biomarkers %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  select(CONP_ID, all_of(BIOMARKERS)) %>%
  select(-ptau217) %>%
  filter_at(vars(-CONP_ID), all_vars(!is.na(.))) %>%
  slice_tail() 

all_dat <- predictors_dat %>% 
  left_join((ptau217_last %>%
               select(CONP_ID, ptau217)), by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join(other_biomarkers_last, by="CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(gfap_log = log(gfap),
         nfl_log = log(nfl),
         ptau181_log = log(ptau181),
         ptau217_log = log(ptau217),
         ptau231_sqrt = sqrt(ptau231)) %>%
  column_to_rownames(var="CONP_ID")
```

# CRS distribution
```{r crs-distribution-plot}
cogd_hist <- predictors_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=score_cogd)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..), binwidth=2) +
  geom_density(color="red") 

libra2_hist <- predictors_dat %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=score_libra2)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y=..density..), binwidth=2) +
  geom_density(color="red") 

plot1 <- cogd_hist | libra2_hist
plot1
```

# CRS vs diagnosis
```{r crs-vs-diagnosis-plot}
plot2_dat <- predictors_dat %>%
  left_join((diagnosis %>% select(CONP_ID, Clinical_diagnosis)), 
            by="CONP_ID")

cogd_diag <- ggplot(plot2_dat, aes(x=Clinical_diagnosis, y=score_cogd, 
                                   fill=Clinical_diagnosis)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  
                     label.y.npc = 0.9,
                     geom = "label",
                     #fill = "white",
                     size=3) +
  labs(x = "Diagnosis",
       y = "Score",
       title = "CogDrisk Score by Clinical Diagnosis in PREVENT-AD") +
  theme(legend.position="none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))

libra2_diag <- ggplot(plot2_dat, aes(x=Clinical_diagnosis, y=score_libra2, 
                                   fill=Clinical_diagnosis)) +
  geom_violin(alpha=0.7) +
  geom_boxplot(width=0.1, fill="white") +
  stat_compare_means(method = "anova",  
                     label.y.npc = 0.9,
                     geom = "label",
                     #fill = "white",
                     size=3) +
  labs(x = "Diagnosis",
       y = "Score",
       title = "LIBRA2 Score by Clinical Diagnosis in PREVENT-AD") +
  theme(legend.position="none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))

plot2 <- cogd_diag / libra2_diag
plot2
```

# Risk burden model - Tertiles
```{r risk-burden-model}
risk_dat <- all_dat %>%
  mutate(
    cogdrisk_tertile = ntile(score_cogd, 3),
    libra2_tertile = ntile(score_libra2, 3),
    grs_tertile = ntile(GRS, 3),
    fhx_burden = if_else(family_history == "1 FDR", 0, 1),
    apoe_burden = if_else(apoe == "e4+", 1, 0),
    
    # Strategy 1: Median split (50th percentile)
    cogdrisk_binary_median = ifelse(score_cogd >= median(score_cogd, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                    "High", "Low"),
    libra2_binary_median = ifelse(score_libra2 >= median(score_libra2, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                  "High", "Low"),
    grs_binary_median = ifelse(GRS >= median(GRS, na.rm = TRUE), 
                               "High", "Low"),
    
    # Strategy 2: Top tertile (67th percentile)
    cogdrisk_binary_tertile = ifelse(score_cogd >= quantile(score_cogd, 2/3, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                     "High", "Low"),
    libra2_binary_tertile = ifelse(score_libra2 >= quantile(score_libra2, 2/3, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                   "High", "Low"),
    grs_binary_tertile = ifelse(GRS >= quantile(GRS, 2/3, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                "High", "Low"),
    
    # Strategy 3: Top quartile (75th percentile)
    cogdrisk_binary_quartile = ifelse(score_cogd >= quantile(score_cogd, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                      "High", "Low"),
    libra2_binary_quartile = ifelse(score_libra2 >= quantile(score_libra2, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                      "High", "Low"),
    grs_binary_quartile = ifelse(GRS >= quantile(GRS, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                      "High", "Low"),
    
    # Strategy 4: 1 SD above mean
    cogdrisk_binary_1sd = ifelse(score_cogd > mean(score_cogd, na.rm = TRUE) + 
                                    sd(score_cogd, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                 "High", "Low"),
    libra2_binary_1sd = ifelse(score_libra2 > mean(score_libra2, na.rm = TRUE) + 
                                    sd(score_libra2, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                 "High", "Low"),
    grs_binary_1sd = ifelse(GRS > mean(GRS, na.rm = TRUE) + 
                                    sd(GRS, na.rm = TRUE), 
                                 "High", "Low")
  )

outcomes <- c("ab_ratio", "gfap_log", "nfl_log", "ptau181_log", "ptau217_log", "ptau231_sqrt")

models <- tribble(~model, ~predictors,
                  "CogDrisk_0", "apoe_burden + cogdrisk_tertile + grs_tertile + fhx_burden",
                  "LIBRA2_0", "age + sex + BMI + apoe_burden + libra2_tertile + grs_tertile + fhx_burden",
                  "Full_0", "apoe_burden + cogdrisk_tertile + libra2_tertile + grs_tertile + fhx_burden",
                  
                  "CogDrisk_1", "apoe_burden + cogdrisk_binary_median + grs_binary_median + fhx_burden",
                  "LIBRA2_1", "age + sex + BMI + apoe_burden + libra2_binary_median + grs_binary_median + fhx_burden",
                  "Full_1", "apoe_burden + cogdrisk_binary_median + libra2_binary_median + grs_binary_median + fhx_burden",
                  
                  "CogDrisk_2", "apoe_burden + cogdrisk_binary_tertile + grs_binary_tertile + fhx_burden",
                  "LIBRA2_2", "age + sex + BMI + apoe_burden + libra2_binary_tertile + grs_binary_tertile + fhx_burden",
                  "Full_2", "apoe_burden + cogdrisk_binary_tertile + libra2_binary_tertile + grs_binary_tertile + fhx_burden",
                  
                  "CogDrisk_3", "apoe_burden + cogdrisk_binary_quartile + grs_tertile + fhx_burden",
                  "LIBRA2_3", "age + sex + BMI + apoe_burden + libra2_binary_quartile + grs_binary_quartile + fhx_burden",
                  "Full_3", "apoe_burden + cogdrisk_binary_quartile + libra2_binary_quartile + grs_binary_quartile + fhx_burden",
                  
                  "CogDrisk_4", "apoe_burden + cogdrisk_binary_1sd + grs_tertile + fhx_burden",
                  "LIBRA2_4", "age + sex + BMI + apoe_burden + libra2_binary_1sd + grs_binary_1sd + fhx_burden",
                  "Full_4", "apoe_burden + cogdrisk_binary_1sd + libra2_binary_1sd + grs_binary_1sd + fhx_burden") 

# Testing tertiles
risk_preventad <- expand_grid(
  outcome = outcomes,
  models
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    eq = glue("{outcome} ~ {predictors}"),
    res = map(eq, ~lm(as.formula(.), data = risk_dat)),
    dataf = map(res, tidy),
    mod = map(res, glance)
  )
```

```{r risk-burden-model-results}
res_risk_preventad <- bind_rows(select(risk_preventad, model, outcome, dataf)) %>%
  unnest(dataf) %>%
  filter(
    str_detect(term, '^apoe_burden|^cogdrisk_|^libra2_|^grs_|^fhx_burden')
  ) %>%
  arrange(outcome, term, estimate) %>%
  mutate(
    # Significance flag
    sig = ifelse(p.value < 0.05, TRUE, FALSE),
    
    # Confidence intervals
    conf.low = estimate - (std.error * 1.96),
    conf.high = estimate + (std.error * 1.96),
    
    # Exponentiated values for log-transformed outcomes 
    exp_est = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ exp(estimate),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_lci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ exp(conf.low),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    exp_uci = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ exp(conf.high),
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    pct_change = case_when(
      str_detect(outcome, "_log") ~ (exp_est - 1) * 100,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ),
    
    # Result category
    res = case_when(
      sig == TRUE ~ "Significant",
      sig == FALSE ~ "Not Significant"
    ),
    stars = case_when(
      p.value > 0.05 ~ "", 
      between(p.value,  0.01, 0.05) ~ "*",
      between(p.value, 0.001, 0.01) ~ "**",
      p.value < 0.001 ~ "***"
    )
  ) %>%
  # Round numeric values
  mutate(across(c(estimate, std.error, statistic, p.value, 
                  conf.low, conf.high, exp_est, exp_lci, exp_uci, pct_change), 
                ~round(., digits = 3)))
```

## Risk burden model results - Plot
```{r risk-burden-model-plot}
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 10
#| out-width: "100%"

for (i in models$model){
  model_title <- case_when(
    i == "CogDrisk_0" ~ "CogDrisk Risk Burden Model",
    i == "LIBRA2_0" ~ "LIBRA2 Risk Burden Model",
    i == "Full_0" ~ "Full Risk Burden Model",
    
    i == "CogDrisk_1" ~ "CogDrisk Risk Burden Model (Median split)",
    i == "LIBRA2_1" ~ "LIBRA2 Risk Burden Model (Median split)",
    i == "Full_1" ~ "Full Risk Burden Model (Median split)",
    
    i == "CogDrisk_2" ~ "CogDrisk Risk Burden Model (Top tertile)",
    i == "LIBRA2_2" ~ "LIBRA2 Risk Burden Model (Top tertile)",
    i == "Full_2" ~ "Full Risk Burden Model (Top tertile)",
    
    i == "CogDrisk_3" ~ "CogDrisk Risk Burden Model (Top quartile)",
    i == "LIBRA2_3" ~ "LIBRA2 Risk Burden Model (Top quartile)",
    i == "Full_3" ~ "Full Risk Burden Model (Top quartile)",
    
    i == "CogDrisk_4" ~ "CogDrisk Risk Burden Model (1 SD above mean)",
    i == "LIBRA2_4" ~ "LIBRA2 Risk Burden Model (1 SD above mean)",
    i == "Full_4" ~ "Full Risk Burden Model (1 SD above mean)",
    TRUE ~ paste("Model:", i)
  )
  
  # Determine color variable for this model
  # use_term_colors <- i %in% c("model0", "model1")
  
  # Prepare data with conditional color variable
  plot_data <- res_risk_preventad %>%
    filter(model == i) %>%  
    mutate(sig = factor(sig, levels = c(TRUE, FALSE)))
  
  res_plot <- ggplot(plot_data,
    aes(y = term, x = estimate, group = term, xmin = conf.low, xmax = conf.high, 
        color = term, alpha = sig)  # Added alpha aesthetic
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +  # Fixed size
  geom_errorbarh(linewidth = 0.8, position = position_dodge(width = 0.5), height = 0.2) +  # Fixed linewidth
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  scale_alpha_manual(
    values = c(`FALSE` = 0.3, `TRUE` = 1),  # Not sig = transparent, sig = opaque
    labels = c(`FALSE` = "Not Significant", `TRUE` = "Significant"),
    name = "Significance"
  ) +
  scale_color_jama() +
  facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    x = "Beta (95% CI)",
    y = "Predictor",
    title = model_title
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10, angle = 0, hjust = 1),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 9)
  )
  
  print(res_plot)
}
```

# Diagnostics plot
```{r}
#| fig-width: 14
#| fig-height: 14
#| out-width: "100%"

for (i in models$model){
  model_title <- case_when(
    i == "CogDrisk_0" ~ "CogDrisk Risk Burden Model",
    i == "LIBRA2_0" ~ "LIBRA2 Risk Burden Model",
    i == "Full_0" ~ "Full Risk Burden Model",
    
    i == "CogDrisk_1" ~ "CogDrisk Risk Burden Model (Median split)",
    i == "LIBRA2_1" ~ "LIBRA2 Risk Burden Model (Median split)",
    i == "Full_1" ~ "Full Risk Burden Model (Median split)",
    
    i == "CogDrisk_2" ~ "CogDrisk Risk Burden Model (Top tertile)",
    i == "LIBRA2_2" ~ "LIBRA2 Risk Burden Model (Top tertile)",
    i == "Full_2" ~ "Full Risk Burden Model (Top tertile)",
    
    i == "CogDrisk_3" ~ "CogDrisk Risk Burden Model (Top quartile)",
    i == "LIBRA2_3" ~ "LIBRA2 Risk Burden Model (Top quartile)",
    i == "Full_3" ~ "Full Risk Burden Model (Top quartile)",
    
    i == "CogDrisk_4" ~ "CogDrisk Risk Burden Model (1 SD above mean)",
    i == "LIBRA2_4" ~ "LIBRA2 Risk Burden Model (1 SD above mean)",
    i == "Full_4" ~ "Full Risk Burden Model (1 SD above mean)",
    TRUE ~ paste("Model:", i)
  )
  
  model_data <- risk_preventad %>%
    filter(model == i) %>%
    mutate(
      residuals = map(res, residuals),
      fitted = map(res, fitted)
    ) %>%
    select(outcome, residuals, fitted) %>%
    unnest(c(residuals, fitted))
    
  # Histogram
  p_hist <- ggplot(model_data, aes(x = residuals)) +
    geom_histogram(bins = 20, fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7, color = "white") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free_x", ncol = 3) +
    labs(title = "Histogram of Residuals",
         x = "Residuals", y = "Count") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    )
    
  # Q-Q plot
  p_qq <- ggplot(model_data, aes(sample = residuals)) +
    stat_qq(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.6) +
    stat_qq_line(color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
    facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
    labs(title = "Q-Q Plot",
         x = "Theoretical Quantiles", y = "Sample Quantiles") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    )
    
  # Residuals vs Fitted
  p_fitted <- ggplot(model_data, aes(x = fitted, y = residuals)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_smooth(se = FALSE, color = "blue", linewidth = 0.8, method = "loess") +
    facet_wrap(~outcome, scales = "free", ncol = 3) +
    labs(title = "Residuals vs Fitted Values",
         x = "Fitted Values", y = "Residuals") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10),
      strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90", color = NA),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5)
    )
  
  # Stack vertically
  combined <- p_hist / p_qq / p_fitted +
    plot_annotation(
      title = model_title,
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
    )
  print(combined)
  
  # Save each plot
  # filename <- paste0("PREVENTAD_diagnostics_", i, ".png")
  # ggsave(file.path(AIM1_OUTPUT_PATH$figures, filename), combined, width = 14, height = 14, dpi = 300)
}
```
